and answer the questions accordingly.

Eight people A, B, C, D, J, K, L, and M are sitting

at a rectangular shaped table. Four of them sit

on the corner of the table and face inside rest

of them sit on the middle of the table and face

outside.

Only two people sit between M and C, who is

not an immediate neighbour of L. Only two

people sit between K and J, who do not sit in

the middle of the table. M is three places away

from K. The number of people sitting between J

and A is the same as the number of people

sitting between D and M. The one who faces A

sits third to the right of C. B is not sit immediate

left of J.

Who among the following sits opposite M?
